'''chavupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadsider|roadsider]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadsider|roadsider]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chavupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chævipith|chævipith]] || [[word:chævipij|chævipij]] || [[word:chævipish|chævipish]] || [[word:chævipi|chævipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavuvuputh|chavuvuputh]] || [[word:chavuvupuj|chavuvupuj]] || [[word:chavuvupush|chavuvupush]] || [[word:chavuvupu|chavuvupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavuputh|chavuputh]] || [[word:chavupuj|chavupuj]] || [[word:chavupush|chavupush]] || [[word:chavupu|chavupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavufputh|chavufputh]] || [[word:chavufpuj|chavufpuj]] || [[word:chavufpush|chavufpush]] || [[word:chavufpuf|chavufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavuputhu|chavuputhu]] || [[word:chavupuju|chavupuju]] || [[word:chavupushu|chavupushu]] || [[word:chavupuku|chavupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavuputh|chavuputh]] || [[word:chavupuj|chavupuj]] || [[word:chavupush|chavupush]] || [[word:chavupu|chavupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavuputhul|chavuputhul]] || [[word:chavupujul|chavupujul]] || [[word:chavupushul|chavupushul]] || [[word:chavupukul|chavupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavuputhuthu|chavuputhuthu]] || [[word:chavupujuju|chavupujuju]] || [[word:chavupushushu|chavupushushu]] || [[word:chavupuku|chavupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavuputhun|chavuputhun]] || [[word:chavupujun|chavupujun]] || [[word:chavupushun|chavupushun]] || [[word:chavupukun|chavupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavuputhuoro|chavuputhuoro]] || [[word:chavupujuoro|chavupujuoro]] || [[word:chavupushuoro|chavupushuoro]] || [[word:chavupukuoro|chavupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
